---modal---
2747:     <div class="modal-body">
2748:       <div id="modalProductCategory"></div>
2749:       <div id="modalProductName"></div>
2750:       <div id="modalProductPrice"></div>
2751:       <div class="modal-actions" style="display:flex;gap:.75rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
2752:         <button class="btn-primary" onclick="openWhatsApp(window.currentProduct?.name || 'Product')">Request Quote via WhatsApp</button>
2753:         <button class="btn btn-brown" onclick="openPayment(window.currentProduct?.name || 'Interior Product', Number(String(window.currentProduct?.price || '').replace(/[^0-9]/g, '')) || 0, window.currentProduct?.image)">Checkout</button>
2754:         <button class="btn-secondary" onclick="closeProductModal()">Close</button>
